Portfolio

Work

We build software for communities that deserve better tools. Our work spans mobile apps, desktop utilities, web applications, CLI tools, and civic systems.

Early work tends to be quiet. This page will grow as projects are ready for public eyes.

Current focus

We are currently building tools for niche and underserved communities — projects that connect unrelated technologies thoughtfully and solve real problems for real people.

Follow progress on GitHub.

Working with us

If you have a project that needs careful thinking, we’d like to hear about it.

Get in touch
